# Godrej Samaris

> Low-density luxury 3 & 4 BHK residences (with study) by Godrej Properties in Sector 53, Gurugram — off Golf Course Road. Spread across 7.5 acres with ~80% open greens, G+38 towers and dual clubhouses. Prices from ₹9.68 Cr onwards.

## Key Facts
- Project: Godrej Samaris
- Developer: Godrej Properties Limited (founded 1990)
- Location: Sector 53, Gurugram, Haryana 122022 (Golf Course Road)
- Configurations: 3 BHK (3050 sq.ft.) and 4 BHK (3750 sq.ft.), each with a study
- Starting price: ₹9.68 Cr onwards (3 BHK); 4 BHK on request
- Land parcel: 7.5 acres | Structure: G + 38 floors | ~80% open greens
- RERA: HRERA-PKL-REA-3199-2024
- Rating: 4.8 / 5 (60 Google reviews)

## Connectivity
- Sector 54 Chowk Metro — walking distance
- Golf Course Road — direct access
- IGI Airport — ~30 min drive
- Nearby: IILM University, Artemis & Max Hospital, DLF Golf Course, Central Plaza & Ardee Mall

## Amenities
Swimming pool, gymnasium, yoga deck, mini theatre, dual (verdant) clubhouses, reading lounge, VRF air-conditioning, reserved parking, landscaped greens, multipurpose sports court, kids' play area.

## Contact
- Enquiries: https://godrej-samaris.in/#enquire
- Phone: +91 22 4896 3298

## Notes
Authorised marketing partner: Home Bazaar Services Pvt Ltd. Prices are indicative and subject to change.
